title: ICARION Reaction Database Schema
description: Schema for ICARION reaction database (v1.1.0). Defines single reactant to single product reactions with concentration-dependent rate constants.

reactant.description: Species ID of the reactant (must exist in species database)

product.description: Species ID of the product (must exist in species database)

rate_constant.description: Base rate constant (k₀ or A). Units depend on reaction order: [s⁻¹] for 0th-order (spontaneous), [m³/s] for 2nd-order (1 neutral, exponent=1), [m⁶/s] for 3rd-order (exponent=2 or two exponent=1 terms).

activation_energy_eV.description: Activation energy in eV (Arrhenius and ModifiedArrhenius models)

temperature_exponent.description: Temperature exponent n for ModifiedArrhenius: k(T) = A × (T/T₀)ⁿ × exp(-Eₐ/(kB·T))

reference_temperature_K.description: Reference temperature T₀ in Kelvin (ModifiedArrhenius model)

order.description: Optional concentration-dependent order terms for effective rate calculation

species.description: Species ID for concentration dependence. Use 'neutral' only for non-equilibrium buffer gas fallback; use 'M' for a third-body placeholder.

concentration_m3.description: Fixed concentration in m⁻³. Use -1.0 for buffer gas fallback, ≥0 for explicit value (VALIDATION: must be ≥ -1.0)

description.description: Optional human-readable description of the reaction

reference.description: Optional literature reference for rate constant

temperature_K.description: Temperature in Kelvin at which rate constant was measured

equilibrium.description: Mark reaction as equilibrium-capable (forward+reverse pair). If true and delta_r_H_J_mol and delta_r_S_J_molK are both provided, a dynamic reverse reaction will be auto-generated. v1.1 equilibrium is a population-balance model for A+ + nX -> B+ + products; neutral products are not explicit state variables, and order terms are also interpreted as thermodynamic neutral partners. Do not use species 'neutral' with equilibrium=true; use an explicit neutral species or third-body placeholder 'M'.

delta_r_H_J_mol.description: Enthalpy of reaction ΔrH° in J/mol (SI, primary). Required together with delta_r_S_J_molK to auto-generate equilibrium reverse reactions. Legacy key delta_r_H_kcalmol is still accepted but deprecated.

delta_r_S_J_molK.description: Entropy of reaction ΔrS° in J/(mol·K) (SI, primary). Required together with delta_r_H_J_mol to auto-generate equilibrium reverse reactions. Legacy key delta_r_S_cal_molK is still accepted but deprecated.

delta_r_H_kcalmol.description: DEPRECATED: use delta_r_H_J_mol instead. Enthalpy of reaction ΔrH° in kcal/mol. Converted automatically to J/mol by the loader.

delta_r_S_cal_molK.description: DEPRECATED: use delta_r_S_J_molK instead. Entropy of reaction ΔrS° in cal/(mol·K). Converted automatically to J/(mol·K) by the loader.

linked_forward_id.description: For reverse reactions only: ID of the linked forward reaction used to evaluate K_eq(T). Used internally when reverse_dynamic_from_equilibrium is true.

reverse_dynamic_from_equilibrium.description: For reverse reactions only: flag indicating this reverse rate is dynamically evaluated from K_eq(T) and the forward effective rate. Auto-set for auto-generated reversals.

reactions.reference: Smith et al., J. Chem. Phys. (2020)
Doe et al., Int. J. Mass Spectrom. (2021)
Johnson et al., Phys. Chem. Chem. Phys. (2022)

reactions.description: Forward reaction in equilibrium pair. Reverse reaction (rxn_004_equilibrium_forward__reverse) will be auto-generated.
